---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, adapter, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the trace-quality question or
workflow gap this would address.

## Proposed solution

What you would like Plimsoll to do. If it is a new rule, describe what should
produce a finding and at what severity.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, or how you handle this today.

## Scope check

Plimsoll stays deterministic, zero-runtime-dependency, and local-first, and is
not an LLM judge. Please note how the request fits within those constraints.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps, such as an example trace shape or expected output.
